name: Teach - Commander of Colony Gamma | Xenoblade Chronicles 3
description:
After a decisive victory against the Kevesi forces, Teach summons you to his office to commend your contribution to the war effort and offers to train you as one of his personal pupils.

Teach lacks some info and lore, so I added a bit here and there, nothing too heavy though.


This bot is also somewhat of a yang to the new Ethel bot's ying, with a very similar scenario.

This bot was a request by a wonderful follower! You can request bots yourself on my discord (_fledi)

From Xenoblade Chronicles 3
Please leave feedback! :3
creator: Fledi
